2603.20698.title: Clinical Cognition Alignment for Gastrointestinal Diagnosis with Multimodal LLMs
2603.20698.paper_summary: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated remarkable potential in medical image analysis. However, their application in gastrointestinal endoscopy is currently hindered by two critical limitations: the misalignment between general model reasoning and standardized clinical cognitive pathways, and the lack of causal association between visual features and diagnostic outcomes. In this paper, we propose a novel Clinical-Cognitive-Aligned (CogAlign) framework to address these challenges. First, we endow the model with rigorous clinical analytical capabilities by constructing the hierarchical clinical cognition dataset and employing Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT). Unlike conventional approaches, this strategy internalizes the hierarchical diagnostic logic of experts, ranging from anatomical localization and morphological evaluation to microvascular analysis, directly into the model. Second, to eliminate visual bias, we provide a theoretical analysis demonstrating that standard supervised tuning inevitably converges to spurious background correlations. Guided by this insight, we propose a counterfactual-driven reinforcement learning strategy to enforce causal rectification. By generating counterfactual normal samples via lesion masking and optimizing through clinical-cognition-centric rewards, we constrain the model to strictly ground its diagnosis in causal lesion features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves State-of-the-Art (SoTA) performance across multiple benchmarks, significantly enhancing diagnostic accuracy in complex clinical scenarios. All source code and datasets will be made publicly available.
2603.20698.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在醫學影像分析中展現了卓越的潛力。<lb/>然而，它們在胃腸內視鏡的應用目前受到兩個關鍵限制的阻礙：一般模型推理與標準化臨床認知路徑之間的不一致，以及視覺特徵與診斷結果之間缺乏因果關聯。<lb/>在本文中，我們提出了一個新穎的臨床認知對齊（CogAlign）框架來應對這些挑戰。<lb/>首先，我們通過構建分層臨床認知數據集並採用監督微調（SFT）來賦予模型嚴謹的臨床分析能力。<lb/>與傳統方法不同，這一策略將專家的分層診斷邏輯內化到模型中，涵蓋從解剖定位和形態評估到微血管分析的各個方面。<lb/>其次，為了消除視覺偏見，我們提供了一個理論分析，證明標準監督調整不可避免地會收斂到虛假的背景相關性。<lb/>在這一見解的指導下，我們提出了一種以反事實為驅動的強化學習策略，以強化因果修正。<lb/>通過通過病變遮罩生成反事實正常樣本並通過以臨床認知為中心的獎勵進行優化，我們限制模型將其診斷嚴格建立在因果病變特徵上。<lb/>大量實驗表明，我們的方法在多個基準測試中達到了最先進（SoTA）的性能，顯著提高了複雜臨床場景中的診斷準確性。<lb/>所有源代碼和數據集將公開提供。
2603.20698.author: Huan Zheng et.al.
2603.20698.authors: Huan Zheng, Yucheng Zhou, Tianyi Yan, Dubing Chen, Hongbo Lu, Wenlong Liao, Tao He, Pai Peng, Jianbing Shen
